scene: Stan sitting at the desk staring at the big glowing DUE TOMORROW task, unable to start, big black caps JUST START? (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
The glowing task radiating a gray storm cloud hand-lettered DREAD and FEAR, big black caps IT'S A FEELING. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Stan leaning and turning away from the storm cloud, not the task, big black caps AVOIDING THE FEELING. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Stan's round head opened to show a sneaky brain pressing a red STOP button, big black caps YOUR BRAIN. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A big glowing red question mark on a simple flat background, big black caps IT HAS A NAME. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
